programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Big Bike Shop; The Crew Builds a Super Tub
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival, unless Speed Meister beats them to it; when Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods; when Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another boo-boo.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. a Neon Humdinger; Pups Save a Royal Painting
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, the PAW Patrol must stop it from rolling through town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Trophy; Pups Save the Wind Trekkers
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's mom loses her son's phony trophy, the PAW Patrol have to rescue her and its secret stash of treats; when Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the PAW Patrol and a little snake to rescue them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Call the Cops; Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence, so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back; Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Delivery of Doom; My Father the Boat
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less; when Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Dirty Bubble Bass; Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the dirty bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance; Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob and the secret formula.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone; Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: All Out of Idea Bricks; A Fool Schooled
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina follow their last idea bringing them into Randomland; after discovering that Patrick never finished behavioral training, the family home-schools him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab is left filthy, a magical fish teaches SpongeBob how to keep surfaces looking spiffy, lickety-split; SpongeBob is recruited to cook in the big leagues, but first, he must prove his worth in the test kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Bob; The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy is the only one who can save them; Patrick is sleepwalking, and SpongeBob is unable to wake him up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he is still up to no good; when SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there is no telling what trouble he may cause.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Knock Knock, Who's There?; Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs' house while he's away and takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in; Squidward is forced to room with Patrick.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica learns what her parents have done with her wedding fund; Joey teases Rachel about her late-night reading material.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's efforts to bond with Monica's father (Elliott Gould) backfire during a racquetball game; Rachel tries to teach Joey how to sail; Monica tries to replicate Phoebe's grandmother's cookie recipe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself competing with the gang for his mother's (Laurie Metcalf) attention when she visits.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is devastated when Penny and Bernadette shop for wedding dresses without her.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny spend time alone; Sheldon tries to face his fear of birds.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is jealous when Stuart (Kevin Sussman), a guy from the comic book store, asks Amy out on a date.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard must face the bully who targeted him in high school; Penny confronts her past actions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel considers hiring an inexperienced but handsome man over a better qualified woman as her executive assistant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Engagement Picture
programme.desc: Rachel makes her handsome new assistant (Eddie Cahill) hang out with Joey rather than the women in her office.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Nap Partners
programme.desc: Monica makes Chandler apologize to an old girlfriend (Stacy Galina) for leaving her because she was fat; Monica struggles to select a maid of honor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross' Library Book
programme.desc: Ross' doctoral dissertation is stored in a remote corner of the university library frequently used by students having sex; Rachel and Phoebe bond with Joey's date (Kristin Davis), then try to convince him to continue seeing her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs
programme.desc: Tag joins for Thanksgiving dinner; Joey may have ruined Rachel's chances with Tag when he opens his mouth during dinner; Phoebe reveals that she has been secretly keeping a dog in her room for a few days while its owner is away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel finds it embarrassing that she is paying the way for her hunky new boyfriend (Eddie Cahill), who is also her assistant at work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire senses Phil may be more into "Juliana" than her; Gloria's sister visits; Mitchell and Cameron get into a situation with Anders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire takes a first class seat on a flight, leaving Phil in coach; Gloria makes Jay teach Manny how to defend himself; Mitch, Cam and their friends throw Sal a belated baby shower.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While stuck at the airport, Claire partakes in online snooping that creates drama with the rest of the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When there's a break-in at Calvin's business, he teams up with Dave for a stakeout to catch the culprit in the act; Gemma is uncharacteristically reluctant to share her new hobby with Tina.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Calvin discovers his friend Lorenzo is harboring a secret, he struggles with whether to share the information with Tina; Dave becomes concerned about Gemma's growing closeness to a coach at her school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Big Little Leagues
programme.desc: Calvin and Malcolm butt heads on coaching styles as Malcolm's little league team approaches its first game of the season; Tina tries to win over a food critic she inadvertently offended before he reviews her cupcakes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house; the beneficiaries of Sandy's treedome pay her a visit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Hummy Mummy's New Home; Pups Save Adventure Bakes
programme.desc: A pair of alligators take Mayor Humdinger's mother, Helga Humdinger, on a wild ride across Foggy Bottom!; Winnie Winnington is determined to beat Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta in a cooking competition to find Adventure Bay's best bakers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Bedtime; Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle, but their phone cuts out when they try to call the Paw Patrol; after Chickaletta lays an egg, it rolls away and heads through town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Manatee; Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to get a manatee to the swamp; Mr. Porter and Alex get into a sticky situation involving maple syrup.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Jungle Pups: Pups Save the Big, Big Animals
programme.desc: When the Hidden Jungle animals appear to be uncharacteristically frightened, Marshall discovers a saber-tooth tiger has been stalking them; the big-fanged tiger is not the only creature strangely awakening from long, long ago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Elephant Spa; Pups Save an Underwater Otis
programme.desc: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa; Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis' claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. the Hum-flectors; Pups Save a Capybara
programme.desc: After a drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn; the PAW Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Aqua Pups Save a Floating Castle; Aqua Pups Save the Reef; Aqua Pups Stop a Giant Squid; Aqua Pups Save a Mer-Race; Aqua Pups Save a Merdinger
programme.desc: Moby wants to clear all the Merpups out of Puplantis and make the castle his own; the PAW Patrol is there to stop his soggy schemes with help from a new Cockapoo Merpup named Coral.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Stop the Return of Humsquatch; Pups Save a Lonely Ghost
programme.desc: When Eddie and Emmy get impatient at the carnival, they hide in Mayor Humdinger's Humsquatch costume to chase everyone out; Rubble dreams that he meets a ghost and learns that it's not easy to help a ghost make new friends.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. Ouchy Paws; Pups Save a Glow-in-the-Dark Party
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard; Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Big BBQ
programme.desc: Adventure Bay gets a fire station; when disaster strikes during the opening day BBQ, it's up to the PAW Patrol in their new fire rescue gear and vehicles to put it out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Flaming Flounder; Fire Rescue: Pups Make the News
programme.desc: Francois' pants catch on fire, sending both the Lighthouse and Cap'n Turbot's Flounder up in flames; a news crew is in town when Chickaletta accidentally causes a fire in Adventure Bay's new parkette.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: PL-1413; In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces; SpongeBob, Patrick and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Who's Afraid of Mr. Snippers?; A Fish Called Sandy
programme.desc: Squidward and Plankton come together to make their very own stage play where SpongeBob is cast as the villain; Sandy decides to give herself gills so she can truly experience Bikini Bottom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: While house sitting, Stella lets her friends use Principal Ramirez's pool on a super hot day; Luna and Luan get competitive when they find out they are competing for the same performance grant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Great moments of SpongeBob's favorite next door neighbor, Squidward.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Now that Gru has forsaken a life of crime to raise Margo, Agnes and Edith, he's trying to figure out how to provide for his new family. As he struggles with his responsibilities as a father, the Anti-Villain League, an organization dedicated to fighting evil, comes calling. The AVL sends Gru on a mission to capture the perpetrator of a spectacular heist, for who would be better than the world's greatest ex-villain to capture the individual who seeks to usurp his power.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Cheesecakes

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: Celebrating Rachel's 30th birthday inspires the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays -- Joey got angry with God for breaking their deal; Ross bought a sports car; Monica got drunk and embarrassed herself at her surprise party.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joey's New Brain
programme.desc: Joey accidentally informs a cast member (Susan Sarandon) that she will be fired so that his character will get her character's brain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly reminisce about London until a startling revelation leaves Chandler floored.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When their competitor releases a catchy ad, Claire and Jay scramble to shoot a commercial of their own; Phil, Luke and Manny try to take down a drone that a neighbor keeps using to spy on Gloria; Andy is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire tackles spring cleaning; Phil has a difficult time when Luke seems to outperform him at many things; Haley tries to distract Alex by taking her to a music festival; Gloria attends Cameron's faculty talent show.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops amnesia and goes missing; SpongeBob must deliver the secret Krabby patty ingredient safely to the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob loses his identity tag; SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing; SpongeBob's parents are missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
